name: PerkOS A2A
description: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol communication for OpenClaw agents
author: PerkOS

agentName.description: This agent's name in the council

port.description: Port for the A2A HTTP server (5050 default; macOS uses 5000 for AirPlay)

mode.description: Server mode: full (listen + send), client-only (send only), relay (run as hub), auto (detect)

skills.description: Skills this agent exposes via A2A

peers.description: Map of peer agent names to their A2A URLs

enabled.description: Enable relay hub connection for NAT traversal

url.description: WebSocket URL of the relay hub (e.g. wss://relay.perkos.xyz)

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the relay hub

hubPort.description: Port when running as relay hub (mode: relay)

hubApiKeys.description: Valid API keys when running as relay hub

relay.description: Relay hub configuration for NAT traversal

peerAuth.description: Map of peer agent names to their API keys for outbound requests

requireApiKey.description: Require API key for incoming HTTP A2A requests

apiKeys.description: Valid API keys for incoming requests
